<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Musas · Deco Sustentable</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --sand:#F2EDE4; --linen:#E8DFD0; --bark:#7A6248;
    --ocean:#2E5E6E; --foam:#A8C5C9; --rust:#B85C38;
    --ink:#1E2420; --mist:#F7F4EF;
  }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { background:var(--mist); color:var(--ink); font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-weight:300; line-height:1.6; overflow-x:hidden; }

  /* NAV */
  nav { position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:100; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:18px 40px; background:rgba(247,244,239,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.15); }
  .nav-logo { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:0.04em; color:var(--ocean); flex-shrink:0; cursor:pointer; text-decoration:none; }
  .nav-logo span { color:var(--rust); }
  .nav-links { display:flex; gap:20px; align-items:center; }
  .nav-links a { text-decoration:none; font-size:0.78rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); transition:color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--ocean); }

  /* DROPDOWN */
  .nav-dropdown { position:relative; }
  .nav-dropdown-btn { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.78rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; transition:color 0.2s; padding:0; }
  .nav-dropdown-btn:hover { color:var(--ocean); }
  .nav-dropdown-btn svg { transition:transform 0.2s; }
  .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-btn svg { transform:rotate(180deg); }
  .nav-dropdown-menu { display:none; position:absolute; top:calc(100% + 14px); left:0; background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.12); border-radius:4px; min-width:180px; box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(30,36,32,0.1); overflow:hidden; z-index:200; }
  .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-menu { display:block; }
  .nav-dropdown-menu a { display:block; padding:11px 18px; font-size:0.76rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); text-decoration:none; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.07); transition:background 0.15s,color 0.15s; }
  .nav-dropdown-menu a:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
  .nav-dropdown-menu a:hover { background:var(--sand); color:var(--ocean); }

  /* NAV FAV */
  .nav-fav-btn { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background:none; border:1px solid rgba(184,92,56,0.35); border-radius:40px; padding:6px 14px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--rust); cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s; }
  .nav-fav-btn:hover { background:var(--rust); color:#fff; border-color:var(--rust); }
  .nav-fav-count { background:var(--rust); color:#fff; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:500; border-radius:50%; width:18px; height:18px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; display:none; }
  .nav-fav-count.visible { display:flex; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero { min-height:100vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; align-items:center; text-align:center; padding:120px 24px 100px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,'); background-size:cover; background-position:center; }
  .hero::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(242,237,228,0.74); z-index:0; }
  .hero::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 90%,rgba(46,94,110,0.06) 0%,transparent 70%); z-index:1; }
  .hero > * { position:relative; z-index:2; }
  .hero-badge { display:inline-block; border:1px solid var(--foam); color:var(--ocean); font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:6px 18px; border-radius:40px; margin-bottom:28px; background:rgba(168,197,201,0.2); }
  .hero h1 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(3.2rem,8vw,6.5rem); font-weight:300; line-height:1.05; letter-spacing:-0.01em; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:12px; }
  .hero h1 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--ocean); }
  .hero-sub { font-size:1rem; color:var(--bark); max-width:420px; margin:20px auto 40px; font-weight:300; }
  .hero-ctas { display:flex; gap:14px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }

  /* SCROLL ARROW */
  .scroll-arrow { margin-top:48px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:6px; cursor:pointer; opacity:0.5; transition:opacity 0.2s; animation:bounceArrow 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .scroll-arrow:hover { opacity:0.9; }
  .scroll-arrow span { font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--bark); }
  .scroll-arrow svg { color:var(--bark); }
  @keyframes bounceArrow { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(6px)} }

  /* BUTTONS */
  .btn-primary { background:var(--ocean); color:#fff; border:none; padding:14px 32px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.82rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; border-radius:2px; transition:background 0.25s,transform 0.15s; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
  .btn-primary:hover { background:var(--bark); transform:translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-outline { background:transparent; color:var(--ocean); border:1px solid var(--ocean); padding:14px 32px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.82rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; border-radius:2px; transition:all 0.25s; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
  .btn-outline:hover { background:var(--ocean); color:#fff; }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding:90px 24px; }
  .section-label { font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.22em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--foam); margin-bottom:8px; display:block; }
  .section-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem); font-weight:300; color:var(--ink); line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:48px; }
  .section-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--ocean); }
  .container { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }
  .section-ocean { background:var(--ocean); }
  .section-ocean .section-label { color:var(--foam); }
  .section-ocean .section-title { color:#fff; }
  .section-ocean .section-title em { color:var(--foam); }
  .section-sand { background:var(--sand); }
  .section-linen { background:var(--linen); }
  .section-mist { background:var(--mist); }

  /* CARDS */
  .cards-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr)); gap:20px; }
  .cards-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; }
  .card { background:#fff; border-radius:4px; padding:28px 24px 20px; position:relative; border:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.1); transition:box-shadow 0.25s,transform 0.2s; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
  .card:hover { box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(30,36,32,0.1); transform:translateY(-3px); }
  .card-on-ocean { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:#fff; }
  .card-on-ocean:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.16); box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
  .card-on-ocean .card-name { color:#fff; }
  .card-on-ocean .card-desc { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
  .card-on-ocean .card-price { color:var(--foam); }
  .card-on-ocean .card-tag { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  .card-on-ocean .fav-btn { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }
  .card-on-ocean .fav-btn:hover,.card-on-ocean .fav-btn.active { color:#ff6b8a; }
  .card-on-ocean .color-label { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
  .card-icon { font-size:1.8rem; margin-bottom:16px; line-height:1; }
  .card-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:400; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .card-desc { font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--bark); line-height:1.55; margin-bottom:16px; min-height:40px; flex:1; }
  .card-footer { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end; margin-top:auto; }
  .card-price { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--ocean); letter-spacing:-0.01em; }
  .card-tag { display:inline-block; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px; background:var(--linen); color:var(--bark); margin-bottom:12px; }
  .card-tag.highlight { background:rgba(168,197,201,0.3); color:var(--ocean); }
  .star-card { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ocean) 0%,#1a4054 100%); color:#fff; border:none; }
  .star-card .card-name { color:#fff; }
  .star-card .card-desc { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
  .star-card .card-price { color:var(--foam); }
  .star-card .card-tag { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  .star-card .fav-btn { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }
  .star-card .fav-btn:hover,.star-card .fav-btn.active { color:#ff6b8a; }
  .star-card .color-label { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

  /* COLOR DOTS */
  .card-colors { display:flex; gap:7px; margin-top:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; }
  .color-dot { width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%; border:1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); flex-shrink:0; cursor:default; transition:transform 0.15s; }
  .color-dot:hover { transform:scale(1.25); }
  .color-label { font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--bark); margin-top:5px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .color-blanco    { background:#F5F0E8; border-color:#ccc; }
  .color-manteca   { background:#F0E2B0; }
  .color-celeste   { background:#87CEEB; }
  .color-rosa      { background:#F4B8C1; }
  .color-rojo-bl   { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D94040 50%,#F5F0E8 50%); }
  .color-cel-bl    { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#87CEEB 50%,#F5F0E8 50%); }
  .color-bison-bl  { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8B7355 50%,#F5F0E8 50%); }
  .color-terracota { background:#C46442; }
  .color-verde     { background:#4E7C59; }
  .color-negro     { background:#1A1A1A; }
  .color-marron    { background:#7B4F2E; }
  .color-natural   { background:#C8A97E; }
  .color-verde-seco{ background:#6B7C5A; }
  .color-azul      { background:#4A7BA7; }

  /* FAV BTN */
  .fav-btn { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:1.3rem; line-height:1; color:rgba(122,98,72,0.35); transition:color 0.2s,transform 0.15s; padding:2px; flex-shrink:0; }
  .fav-btn:hover { color:#ff6b8a; transform:scale(1.2); }
  .fav-btn.active { color:#ff6b8a; }

  /* INFO */
  .info-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr)); gap:28px; margin-top:20px; }
  .info-block { padding:28px; background:#fff; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.1); }
  .info-block-icon { font-size:1.6rem; margin-bottom:14px; }
  .info-block h3 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.2rem; margin-bottom:12px; color:var(--ink); }
  .info-block ul { list-style:none; }
  .info-block ul li { font-size:0.83rem; color:var(--bark); padding:5px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--linen); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
  .info-block ul li:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
  .info-block ul li::before { content:'—'; color:var(--foam); font-size:0.7rem; }
  .extras-row { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:8px; }
  .extra-pill { padding:10px 20px; border:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.2); border-radius:40px; font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--bark); background:#fff; }
  .extra-pill strong { color:var(--rust); }

  /* CTA */
  .cta-section { background:var(--ink); text-align:center; padding:100px 24px; }
  .cta-section .section-label { color:var(--foam); }
  .cta-section h2 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,3.8rem); font-weight:300; color:#fff; margin-bottom:18px; line-height:1.1; }
  .cta-section h2 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--foam); }
  .cta-section p { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-size:0.9rem; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto 40px; line-height:1.9; }

  /* STRIPS */
  .artisan-strip { background:var(--ocean); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-align:center; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:11px; }
  footer { background:var(--ink); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-align:center; padding:28px; font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
  .section-divider { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; margin-bottom:52px; }
  .section-divider::after { content:''; flex:1; height:1px; background:rgba(122,98,72,0.15); }
  .section-divider-ocean::after { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }

  /* FAV MODAL */
  .fav-overlay { position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:200; background:rgba(30,36,32,0.75); backdrop-filter:blur(6px); display:none; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; padding:60px 20px 40px; overflow-y:auto; }
  .fav-overlay.open { display:flex; }
  .fav-modal { background:var(--mist); border-radius:6px; width:100%; max-width:860px; padding:48px 40px; position:relative; animation:slideUp 0.3s ease; }
  @keyframes slideUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
  .fav-modal-close { position:absolute; top:20px; right:24px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:1.4rem; color:var(--bark); line-height:1; transition:color 0.2s; }
  .fav-modal-close:hover { color:var(--ink); }
  .fav-modal-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .fav-modal-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--ocean); }
  .fav-modal-sub { font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--bark); margin-bottom:36px; }
  .fav-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:16px; }
  .fav-empty { text-align:center; padding:48px 0; color:var(--bark); font-size:0.9rem; }
  .fav-empty-icon { font-size:2.5rem; margin-bottom:12px; display:block; opacity:0.4; }
  .fav-modal-cta { margin-top:36px; text-align:center; border-top:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.15); padding-top:28px; }
  .fav-modal-cta p { font-size:0.83rem; color:var(--bark); margin-bottom:14px; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media(max-width:860px){ nav{padding:14px 20px;gap:12px} .nav-links{gap:12px} }
  @media(max-width:640px){
    nav{padding:12px 16px} section{padding:56px 16px} .hero{padding:96px 16px 72px}
    .cards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px} .cards-grid-3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
    .card{padding:18px 14px 14px} .card-name{font-size:1.15rem} .card-price{font-size:1.35rem}
    .fav-modal{padding:32px 16px} .fav-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
    .info-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,11vw,4rem)} .hero-sub{font-size:0.9rem}
    .btn-primary,.btn-outline{padding:12px 22px;font-size:0.76rem}
  }
  @media(max-width:400px){ .cards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .cards-grid-3{grid-template-columns:1fr} .fav-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- FAV OVERLAY -->
<div class="fav-overlay" id="favOverlay">
  <div class="fav-modal">
    <button class="fav-modal-close" id="btnCloseFav">&#x2715;</button>
    <div class="fav-modal-title">Mis <em>Favoritos</em> &#x1F496;</div>
    <div class="fav-modal-sub">Las piezas que guardaste. Cuando quieras pedirlas, un click y listo.</div>
    <div class="fav-grid" id="favGrid"></div>
    <div id="favTotalRow" style="display:none;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:24px;padding:18px 20px;background:#fff;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid rgba(122,98,72,0.12);">
      <span style="font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bark);">Total estimado</span>
      <span id="favTotal" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:600;"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="fav-modal-cta">
      <p>&#x00BF;Te decidiste? Escribinos y coordinamos tu pedido.</p>
      <a id="btnFavWpp" href="#" class="btn-primary" target="_blank">&#x1F4AC; Consultar por mis favoritos</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#" id="btnNavLogo">Musas <span>&middot;</span> Deco Sustentable</a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <div class="nav-dropdown" id="navDropdown">
      <button class="nav-dropdown-btn" id="btnDropdown">
        Inicio
        <svg width="10" height="6" viewBox="0 0 10 6" fill="none">
          <path d="M1 1l4 4 4-4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </button>
      <div class="nav-dropdown-menu">
        <a href="#casitas">&#x1F3E0; Casitas</a>
        <a href="#barcos">&#x26F5; Barcos</a>
        <a href="#capitanes">&#x1F468;&#x200D;&#x2708;&#xFE0F; Capitanes</a>
        <a href="#pueblitos">&#x1F3D8;&#xFE0F; Pueblitos</a>
        <a href="#peces">&#x1F41F; Peces</a>
        <a href="#estrellas">&#x2B50; Nuestras Estrellas</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="#contacto">Contactar</a>
    <button class="nav-fav-btn" id="btnNavFav">
      &#x1F496; Favoritos <span class="nav-fav-count" id="favCount">0</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="hero-top">
  <div class="hero-badge">&#x2756; Hecho a mano &middot; Tigre, Argentina</div>
  <h1>Piezas que<br><em>cuentan historias</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Artesan&#237;as &#250;nicas, elaboradas con materiales reutilizables. Cada pieza es exclusiva.</p>
  <div class="hero-ctas">
    <button class="btn-primary" id="btnHeroFav">&#x1F496; Favoritos</button>
    <a href="https://wa.me/5491145693781?text=Hola%20Musas%2C%20quiero%20consultar%20sobre%20sus%20productos%20%F0%9F%8C%8A" class="btn-outline" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">&#x1F4AC; Consultar</a>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-arrow" id="scrollArrow">
    <span>Ver cat&#225;logo</span>
    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="artisan-strip" id="artisan-strip">100% artesanal &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; exclusivo &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; sustentable &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Tigre</div>
<div id="catalogo"></div>

<!-- CASITAS -->
<section class="section-sand" id="casitas">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-divider"><div><span class="section-label">01 &middot; Colecci&#243;n</span><h2 class="section-title">&#x1F3E0; <em>Casitas</em></h2></div></div>
    <div class="cards-grid">

      <div class="card" data-id="casita-mini" data-icon="&#x1F3E1;" data-name="Casita Mini" data-tag="5cm aprox" data-desc="Peque&#241;a pero con personalidad. Para decorar una repisa." data-price="$7.000" data-type="normal">
        <div class="card-icon">&#x1F3E1;</div><span class="card-tag">5cm aprox</span>
        <div class="card-name">Mini</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Peque&#241;a pero con personalidad. Para decorar una repisa.</div>
        <div class="card-colors">
          <div class="color-dot color-blanco" title="Blanco"></div>
          <div class="color-dot color-manteca" title="Manteca"></div>
          <div class="color-dot color-celeste" title="Celeste pastel"></div>
          <div class="color-dot color-rosa" title="Rosa pastel"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="color-label">Blanco &middot; Manteca &middot; Celeste pastel &middot; Rosa pastel</div>
        <div class="card-footer"><div class="card-price">$7.000</div><button class="fav-btn" onclick="toggleFav(this)" title="Agregar a favoritos">&#x2661;</button></div>
      </div>

  <p>Escribinos y te asesoramos.<br>Cada pedido es &#250;nico, igual que vos.</p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <a href="https://wa.me/5491145693781?text=Hola%20Musas%2C%20quiero%20consultar%20sobre%20sus%20productos%20%F0%9F%8C%8A" class="btn-primary" target="_blank">&#x1F4AC; Consultar</a>
    <a href="https://instagram.com/musasdecosustentable" class="btn-outline" target="_blank" style="color:var(--foam);border-color:var(--foam);">&#x1F4F8; Im&#225;genes</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="artisan-strip" style="background:var(--bark);">Todas las piezas son 100% artesanales &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; elaboradas con amor y materiales reutilizables &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Tigre, Argentina</div>
<footer>&#169; 2025 Musas &middot; Deco Sustentable &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Tigre, Buenos Aires &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Hecho con amor &#x1F30A;</footer>

<script>
  var favs = {};

  function parsePrice(str) {
    if (!str) return 0;
    var n = parseInt(str.replace(/\./g, '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), 10);
    return isNaN(n) ? 0 : n;
  }
  function formatPrice(n) {
    return '$' + n.toLocaleString('es-AR');
  }

  function toggleFav(btn) {
    var card = btn.closest('.card');
    var id = card.dataset.id;
    if (favs[id]) {
      delete favs[id];
      btn.textContent = '\u2661';
      btn.classList.remove('active');
    } else {
      favs[id] = { id:id, icon:card.dataset.icon, name:card.dataset.name, tag:card.dataset.tag, desc:card.dataset.desc, price:card.dataset.price, type:card.dataset.type };
      btn.textContent = '\u2665';
      btn.classList.add('active');
    }
    updateFavCount();
  }

  function removeFavFromModal(id) {
    delete favs[id];
    var btn = document.querySelector('.card[data-id="' + id + '"] .fav-btn');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = '\u2661'; btn.classList.remove('active'); }
    updateFavCount();
    renderFavModal();
  }

  function updateFavCount() {
    var count = Object.keys(favs).length;
    var el = document.getElementById('favCount');
    el.textContent = count;
    el.classList.toggle('visible', count > 0);
  }

  function buildWppFavLink() {
    var items = Object.values(favs);
    if (items.length === 0) return 'https://wa.me/5491145693781?text=Hola%20Musas%2C%20quiero%20consultar%20sobre%20sus%20productos%20%F0%9F%8C%8A';
    var lista = items.map(function(i){ return '\u2022 ' + i.name + ' \u2014 ' + i.price; }).join('\n');
    var msg = 'Hola Musas \uD83D\uDC96 Me gustar\u00EDa consultar por estas piezas que guard\u00E9 como favoritas:\n\n' + lista + '\n\n\u00BFPueden darme m\u00E1s informaci\u00F3n?';
    return 'https://wa.me/5491145693781?text=' + encodeURIComponent(msg);
  }

  function renderFavModal() {
    var grid = document.getElementById('favGrid');
    var totalRow = document.getElementById('favTotalRow');
    var totalEl = document.getElementById('favTotal');
    var items = Object.values(favs);
    document.getElementById('btnFavWpp').href = buildWppFavLink();
    if (items.length === 0) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="fav-empty" style="grid-column:1/-1;"><span class="fav-empty-icon">\uD83D\uDC96</span><p>Todav\u00EDa no guardaste ninguna pieza.</p><p style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.76rem;opacity:0.7;">Toc\u00E1 el coraz\u00F3n de cualquier producto para agregarlo aqu\u00ED.</p></div>';
      totalRow.style.display = 'none'; return;
    }
    grid.innerHTML = items.map(function(item) {
      var cls = item.type==='ocean' ? 'card card-on-ocean' : item.type==='star' ? 'card star-card' : 'card';
      var sty = item.type==='ocean' ? 'background:rgba(46,94,110,0.9);' : '';
      return '<div class="'+cls+'" style="'+sty+'">' +
        '<div class="card-icon">'+item.icon+'</div>' +
        '<span class="card-tag">'+item.tag+'</span>' +
        '<div class="card-name">'+item.name+'</div>' +
        '<div class="card-desc">'+item.desc+'</div>' +
        '<div class="card-footer"><div class="card-price">'+item.price+'</div>' +
        '<button onclick="removeFavFromModal(\''+item.id+'\')" title="Quitar" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.15rem;opacity:0.5;transition:opacity 0.2s;padding:2px;line-height:1;" onmouseover="this.style.opacity=\'1\'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity=\'0.5\'">\uD83D\uDDD1\uFE0F</button>' +
        '</div></div>';
    }).join('');
    var total = 0, hasConsult = false;
    items.forEach(function(item){ var n=parsePrice(item.price); if(n>0) total+=n; else hasConsult=true; });
    totalRow.style.display = 'flex';
    if (total>0 && !hasConsult) { totalEl.innerHTML=formatPrice(total); totalEl.style.color='var(--ocean)'; }
    else if (total>0 && hasConsult) { totalEl.innerHTML=formatPrice(total)+' <span style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:300;opacity:0.6;">+ consultar</span>'; totalEl.style.color='var(--ocean)'; }
    else { totalEl.innerHTML='A consultar'; totalEl.style.color='var(--bark)'; }
  }

  function openFav() { renderFavModal(); document.getElementById('favOverlay').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; }
  function closeFav() { document.getElementById('favOverlay').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow=''; }

  // Logo vuelve arriba
  document.getElementById('btnNavLogo').addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.preventDefault(); window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); });

  // Scroll arrow
  document.getElementById('scrollArrow').addEventListener('click', function(){ document.getElementById('artisan-strip').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); });

  // Dropdown
  document.getElementById('btnDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); document.getElementById('navDropdown').classList.toggle('open'); });
  document.addEventListener('click', function(){ document.getElementById('navDropdown').classList.remove('open'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown-menu a').forEach(function(a){ a.addEventListener('click', function(){ document.getElementById('navDropdown').classList.remove('open'); }); });

  // Botones principales
  document.getElementById('btnHeroFav').addEventListener('click', openFav);
  document.getElementById('btnNavFav').addEventListener('click', openFav);
  document.getElementById('btnCloseFav').addEventListener('click', closeFav);
  document.getElementById('favOverlay').addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===this) closeFav(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeFav(); });
</script>
</body>
</html>
